<!-- 谢谢 PR!请填以下几项。Thanks for the PR — please fill these in. -->

## What & why · 做了什么、为什么

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue: Closes #NN -->

## Type · 类型

- [ ] Algorithm improvement · 算法改进
- [ ] New information source · 新增信息源
- [ ] Bug fix · 缺陷修复
- [ ] Backtest / validation · 回测
- [ ] Docs · 文档

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes · 测试全绿
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` clean · lint 干净
- [ ] New behavior has **offline** tests (no live network in the suite) · 新行为有离线测试
- [ ] LLM outputs stay evidence-backed (quoted sources) · LLM 输出仍带原文证据
- [ ] This does **not** turn the tool into buy/sell signals; it stays an information-risk lens · 不把工具变成买卖信号
- [ ] No secrets committed · 未提交任何密钥

## How you verified · 怎么验证的

<!-- Fixtures flipped, metric moved, backtest comparison, etc. -->
